query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "collectionlora: collecting 50 effects in 1 lora via multi-teacher on-p" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (d) as it addresses the core mechanism of "Multi-Teacher On-P" (On-Policy/Online) knowledge distillation and provides a canonical methodological reference for aligning intermediate hidden states (thought processes) in LLMs, which is the fundamental technical domain of the user's "CollectionLoRA" follow-up. Although it does not explicitly mention LoRA or the specific "50 effects" aggregation, it establishes the empirical baseline and methodological framework
